title: taraxacum prati-lucense
intro: Taraxacum prati-lucense, also known as the Alpine Dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of taraxasterol and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of the Alpine Dandelion have been found to have health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be consumed as a food supplement in capsule or tablet form.
